generator_prompt_injection:
REAL TEST-TAKER INSIGHTS (sourced from r/APStudents, updated 2026-05-11):
- Coverage: Real test-takers report this exam covers breadth over depth. Stay at college 101 level on each topic.
- High-emphasis topics (per real students): physics.
- Students struggle most with: physics. Generate proportionally more on these.
- Wording style: ~0% of items should use realistic exam-style indirection (NOT unfair ambiguity).
- Difficulty target: 20% easy / 55% medium / 25% hard. default — no pass-score data yet.
